Package dk.mada.jaxrs

package dk.mada.jaxrs
OpenApi JAX-RS client code generator.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    dk.mada.jaxrs.generator
    Generator takes care of generating the classes.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.gradle
    Declaration of simple API between the Gradle plugin and the generator.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.model
    A simplified local model that is decoupled from the model provided by the OpenApi library.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.naming
    Takes care of model and source naming rules.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.openapi
    Transforms OpenApi schema-based model to the internal model.
    dk.mada.jaxrs.utils
    Simple utilities used by the generator.
  • Class
    Description
    Console
    Console provides textual output to the user.
    Generator
    Generates JAX-RS code.
    GeneratorException
    Wraps any exception throw while parsing or generating code.
    Main
    Main class for command line invocation.
